name: Scenario 7: Contract Pricing Calculations - Discrepancy (Expected FAIL)
description:
### AI Validation Status: **FAIL**
**Reasoning:**
Pricing validation failed. The contract discount is 15%, but calculated ingredient cost ($95) does not equal expected cost ($85). Additionally, Patient Copay ($10) + Plan Paid ($77.5) does not equal Allowed Amount ($97.5).

**Possible Root Cause:**
Pricing calculation discrepancy in the adjudication engine. Check contract rate tables or discount formulas.
